data.title: Implement figma-resync.py: orchestrate pull, merge, lock, tag swap, and metadata recording
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/figma-resync.py as the user-facing CLI entry point that orchestrates the full Figma pull-back workflow with safety guarantees.

## File to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/figma-resync.py (chmod +x immediately after creation)

## CLI Interface
python3 figma-resync.py <ticket-id> [--non-interactive]
- ticket-id: DSO ticket ID with design:awaiting_review tag and stored Figma file key
- --non-interactive: auto-confirm change summary (for CI); omit for interactive mode

## Orchestration flow
1. PRECONDITION: Run `ticket show <ticket-id>`, parse tags with python3 (no jq). If 'design:awaiting_review' absent, print error and exit 1.
2. EXTRACT FILE KEY: Parse Figma file key from ticket comments (stored by b4c1-06cf story's task).
3. LOCK: Advisory lockfile at /tmp/dso-figma-resync-<ticket-id>.lock
   - Write JSON: {pid: os.getpid(), created_at: ISO timestamp, ticket_id: <id>}
   - If lockfile exists: check mtime against 30-min TTL
     - If stale (mtime > 30 min): remove stale lock, proceed
     - If fresh: print "re-sync already in progress" and exit 1
   - Use try/finally to release lock (remove lockfile) on normal exit
   - On crash: TTL ensures cleanup on next invocation
4. PULL: subprocess call to python3 plugins/dso/scripts/figma-api-fetch.sh <file-key>
   (or figma-node-mapper.py — use whichever entry point is produced by 147a-5eec story tasks).
   Writes figma-spatial.json to temp dir.
5. MERGE: subprocess call to python3 plugins/dso/scripts/figma-merge.py
   --original-dir <manifest-dir> --figma-spatial <figma-spatial.json> --non-interactive
   Capture stdout JSON (FIGMA_MERGE_OUTPUT contract: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/figma-merge-output.md).
   Parse with python3 (no jq).
6. CHANGE SUMMARY: Display components_added/modified/removed/behavioral_specs_preserved counts to user.
7. CONFIRMATION (interactive mode only): Prompt user to confirm. If declined, exit 0 without side effects.
8. TAG SWAP (read-modify-write, preserve other tags):
   - Get current tags from ticket show
   - Remove 'design:awaiting_review', add 'design:approved'
   - Update via ticket CLI
9. METADATA RECORDING: Call ticket-comment.sh (or .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment) with JSON:
   {figma_file_key: ..., timestamp: ..., components_added: ..., components_modified: ...,
    components_removed: ..., behavioral_specs_preserved: ...}
10. EXIT 0

## Implementation notes
- All JSON parsing via python3, never jq (jq-free rule)
- TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW and TAG_APPROVED read from figma-tags.conf constants (dbd2-993e task)
- Set executable bit immediately: chmod +x plugins/dso/scripts/figma-resync.py
- Cross-story dependency: calls scripts from 147a-5eec (pull) and 06c3-d6c7 (merge = 32f6-bb9e)
- File key storage format established by b4c1-06cf story

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma-resync.py exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/figma-resync.py
- [ ] Tag precondition: exits 1 when design:awaiting_review absent
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py::test_tag_precondition_missing -q
- [ ] File lock: exits 1 when fresh lockfile present; stale lock cleaned up
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py::test_lock_held tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py::test_stale_lock_cleanup -q
- [ ] --non-interactive mode skips confirmation, completes tag swap and metadata recording
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py::test_non_interactive -q
- [ ] Tag swap preserves existing tags (read-modify-write)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py::test_tag_swap -q
- [ ] Metadata comment contains all required fields
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py::test_metadata_comment -q
- [ ] All tests in test_figma_resync.py pass (GREEN)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py -q
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
